system.powerDescription:
With a stomp the world shifts around you. Choose a patch of earth up to CAT area in size. This area then raises or lowers up to CAT distance. This manifests as either a violent upheaval as a pillar of stone emerges from the ground or the sudden formation of a sinkhole as the ground recedes. This is liable to cause destruction in the local area as the environment is forced to accommodate. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power.
